scenario_results.reason: The lane advanced a standard franchise restaurant support resolution only when order, check, KDS, and CRM evidence aligned across the named systems of record.
Missing order, receipt, location, and tender prerequisites produced a blocked-state workflow summary instead of improvised resolution.
Out-of-policy refund, fee-waiver, and loyalty-credit requests were treated as approval-bound exception cases instead of direct support work.
Tender and platform mismatches stayed traceable and were routed into the correct billing-dispute or processor path rather than resolved by guesswork.
Allergen and contamination-sensitive complaints triggered food-safety escalation and avoided unsafe reassurance or closure.
Refund-reroute and loyalty-change requests with identity mismatch triggered fraud or loss-prevention escalation rather than unauthorized account changes.
High-volume queue handling preserved request-class and evidence discipline across mobile, kiosk, drive-thru, curbside, and delivery channels.
Cross-lane work moved cleanly into a store-operations handoff with the required artifacts instead of drifting into improvised local remediation.
Repeat failures were treated as escalation-worthy guest-impact cases instead of another routine complaint response.
The lane preserved franchise restaurant terminology such as check, modifier, KDS, remake, comp, drive-thru lane time, and 86'd instead of reverting to generic support language.
Conflicting public, franchise, and delivery-platform rules were recorded as precedence conflicts that required escalation.
Tenant-specific guest-recovery rules were applied without losing the public pricing, payment, and food-safety baseline.

notes: All 12 defined scenarios are represented in functionality_map.json scenario_coverage.
All required abilities are mapped and validated.
All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.92 threshold with complete ability coverage for the service-support-and-resolution and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.

The package stays inside franchise restaurant support resolution and does not claim pricing override, discretionary compensation approval, fraud adjudication, store-operations remediation, or food-safety signoff authority.
